# Portugal North Rail

> Guide to train stations across northern Portugal with budget hotel stays near each stop along the regional railway lines.

Browse Portuguese railway stations with photos, map links, and curated affordable accommodation suggestions nearby. Filter by line, search by name, and save your favorite stops privately.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Searchable list of northern Portugal train stations with nearby budget hotels, filters by line, and private upvote/downvote per station.
